title: NGE Toji as an Eva Pilot
display_title: NGE Toji as an Eva Pilot
wikitext:
[]: NGE: Toji as an Eva Pilot             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Sun Jan 24, 2010 12:21 am How would Evangelion be different if Toji's Eva had never been taken over by the Angel. How would Shinji have interacted with Toji as an Evangelion pilot? Would more of Toji's background be revealed? Would he experience the same mental turmoil as Asuka and Shinji? Thoughts are appreciated.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sun Jan 24, 2010 1:05 am Well, let's see... Bardiel would probably have attacked as some fungus thing, but been killed easily. Shinji would have stuck around instead of having a hissy fit and Zeruel would have been taken out by teamwork instead of Eva-01 getting to nom Big Z. Over the next 33+ days, Shinji would become increasingly well adjusted, and awesome would have happened. Then Arael would have attacked, Shinji would have been deployed against it, horrifically mindraped, and had a heroic BSOD. Armisael's attack, shortly thereafter, would have been dealt with handily without Rei sacrificing herself because at least three Evas would have been available. Kaworu would have shown up, but would have been one voice amongst many in pulling Shinji out of himself, and thus when he gets killed, it won't be too bad a shock because Asuka, Rei, and Toji would all have been there. However, Rei II wouldn't have defied Gendo, and 3I would have happened as per his plan. This is either very good or very bad. Very bad: Everyone dies. Very good: A super happy ending for everyone yay!

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun Jan 24, 2010 1:16 am The above is a surprisingly insightful assessment of the likely outcome of Touji becoming a full time Eva pilot.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jan 24, 2010 1:20 am Though had Rei 2 lived, it's possible she and Shinji would have become close, thus Rei still choosing Shinji over Gendo. Otherwise I agree.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sun Jan 24, 2010 1:22 am I do not believe she had that capacity in her until Rei 3. Rei 3 is the only Rei who seems willing to question Gendo. Rei 2 is just willing to be Shinji's friend.

[]:             Quote Post by Starasp » Sun Jan 24, 2010 1:26 am Legendary wrote: Well, let's see... Bardiel would probably have attacked as some fungus thing, but been killed easily. Shinji would have stuck around instead of having a hissy fit and Zeruel would have been taken out by teamwork instead of Eva-01 getting to nom Big Z. Over the next 33+ days, Shinji would become increasingly well adjusted, and awesome would have happened. Then Arael would have attacked, Shinji would have been deployed against it, horrifically mindraped, and had a heroic BSOD. Armisael's attack, shortly thereafter, would have been dealt with handily without Rei sacrificing herself because at least three Evas would have been available. Kaworu would have shown up, but would have been one voice amongst many in pulling Shinji out of himself, and thus when he gets killed, it won't be too bad a shock because Asuka, Rei, and Toji would all have been there. However, Rei II wouldn't have defied Gendo, and 3I would have happened as per his plan. This is either very good or very bad. Very bad: Everyone dies. Very good: A super happy ending for everyone yay!

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Jan 24, 2010 1:31 am You left out the part where Kensuke, eventually realizing that the entire class is the pilot bench, systematically attempts to drive off, kill or otherwise incapacitate several classmates and eventually one of the pilots (Rei?) in the effort to move himself closer to his own turn at bat.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sun Jan 24, 2010 1:32 am Alternatively, this alternate timeline is caused by there not being a core sample from Shamshel, meaning that Eva-04 isn't blown up and both arrive in Japan on schedule, not rushed, and Kensuke pilots it.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jan 24, 2010 1:35 am Legend: But Rei 2 died to protect Shinji while her dying thoughts were of Gendo , she was starting to head towards where Rei 3 picked up. But I get what you're saying. Also, I wonder what mind-raped Toji would have been like.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sun Jan 24, 2010 1:37 am She died to protect Shinji because he was her friend and because his skin, not Gendo's, was bubbling and screeching in demonic voices. I would easily die to protect many of my friends, but there are three I have loyalty to above all others. With Rei 2, there's Gendo.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Jan 24, 2010 6:51 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Also, I wonder what mind-raped Toji would have been like.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jan 24, 2010 11:40 am This comes close to the " what if EVA-03 and -04 were delivered safely " thread. My answer .

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Jan 24, 2010 5:37 pm What Legendary said, with the addendum of the Kensuke/Unit 04 thing. However, he fails to take into account that since Shinji is the one being mindraped by Arael, he'll probably too traumatized to pilot Unit 01. Therefore, he won't be the one to bond with Kaworu/Tabris. The likely scenario? Kaworu approaches either Asuka, or Rei. If Asuka: Hetero shipping fodder. Asuka confronts the issues she otherwise wouldn't have, and Kaworu sets her on the right track to recovery. Asuka kills him, and it breaks her. Kaworu was the only peer she had who had gained her respect, and most harmfully, she didn't even feel it was a fair fight, since Kaworu couldn't utilize Unit 01. Asuka hates herself. She betrayed her own sense of honor. She took an easy kill, and did so killing the only person she felt understanded her on more than a superficial level. She doesn't want to pilot Eva anymore. Toji and Kensuke fight the MP Evas. Shinji probably gets killed along with Misato, and Asuka gets in Unit 02 in vengeance. The three defeat the MP Evas, but it's too late. Gendo uses Rei to initiate his Instrumentality. ~ If Rei: Rei doesn't trust Kaworu quite so easily, but he does perturb her and make her question some things. She decides to talk to "the Rei within the Eva", and upon doing so finds some uncomfortable truths, causing her to reunite the halves of her soul whilst retreating into the Eva, since she cannot perform the reverse to pull her other self out. Kaworu, enjoying the irony of the situation, takes Unit 00 to go see "Adam." Though the other three active Evangelions come to fight (or, due to space, only one), this is futile, as they are Adam-derived organisms. Kaworu takes possession of these as well. Finding no Lilith, he instead destroys it with the Evangelions, then merges with the four of them to revive Adam (possibly destroying the residing souls and the children pilots). Third Impact. Angels Win.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jan 24, 2010 5:41 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Toji and Kensuke fight the MP Evas.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sun Jan 24, 2010 5:45 pm Aura, note that there are several things you failed to consider: 1) Shinji's past is not nearly so traumatic, and post-Leliel he had already dealt with most of his repressed memories. The mindrape would have been painful, but wouldn't be nearly so debilitating. 2) Kaworu deliberately searched for Shinji inititally. Again, though, the important thing here is that Kaworu's friendship is something that none of the pilots would take so completely unless he were the last option left (as Shinji did). With so many others, Kaworu would just become 'another' friend, and not a last, desperate hope. Thus, while Kaworu would still be charmed by Lilin and willing to surrender, his ultimate death would not shatter anyone's psyche so completely; although it would still be quite painful.

[]:             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Sun Jan 24, 2010 7:07 pm Considering that Shinji was mindraped twice, I wonder if Arael really would have driven him to stop piloting the Eva. Shinji seems to have a pretty large tolerance for mind rape. He was even able to withstand the greatest mind rape of all, 3I. On that note, there's still a possibility of Rei II dying. Eva unit 03 might have been KOed by Armisael.

[]:             Quote Post by Starasp » Sun Jan 24, 2010 7:36 pm Also, Shinji's past isn't nearly as traumatic as Asuka's. Shinji only witnessed his mother vanishing during a test. Asuka had to deal with going to see her insane mother croon over a doll she belives to be Asuka, while not even being recognized by her. And then, Kyoko killed herself in front of her.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Sun Jan 24, 2010 8:16 pm @ OP: The show would suck more. That is all.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Jan 24, 2010 10:52 pm I'm afraid that violates the law of nature that says that Kensuke never gets to pilot.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sun Jan 24, 2010 10:56 pm Asuka had huge amounts of repression. Shinji had comparatively little. Arael's mindrape blasted Asuka's repression away and left her with what was underneath. Shinji would know MOSTLY what was underneath and could struggle on. Arael couldn't hurt him in quite the same way anymore, he's already suffered pain and mental violation.
